title: Container Creation, Process Lifecycle, CLI State, and Cleanup · Independent Container Trial
summary: An independent delivery team receives unfamiliar application constraints and must transfer container creation, process lifecycle, cli state, and cleanup into a new deterministic container lifecycle runbook without copying the workshop scenario. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of deterministic container lifecycle runbook with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Distinguish create, run, start, attach, exec, stop, kill, restart, pause, wait, remove, and auto-remove state transitions.
Apply names, environment, working directory, user, entrypoint, command, labels, hosts, and platform overrides with correct precedence.
Choose foreground, detached, interactive, TTY, attach, and log behavior while preserving standard streams and exit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

lab case — A lab operator inherits 5 similarly named containers: one created, one running, one exited with code 137, and one carrying the only writable-layer report. Inspect identity and state, preserve evidence, then perform label-scoped cleanup.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-cleanup-scope-labels-1sdu0b
  - competency: docker-cleanup-scope-labels
    artifact: container-lifecycle.yaml
    decision: cleanup scope labels
    scenario-variant: 2
    environment: IPv6-enabled Compose project on a shared CI runner
    fault-injection: rotate a required secret between build and runtime
    retained-proof: redacted configuration render and secret-rotation confirmation
    case-key: 1sdu0b
    change: |
      create: immutable-configured-container
      start: same-container-identity
      inspect: state-before-mutation
      cleanup: label-scoped-and-previewed
    verify: docker container inspect training-web --format json
    failure: Reject name-only cleanup, unbounded prune, or a claim that stop and remove preserve writable-layer state.
    repair: Use explicit IDs or labels, inspect before mutation, capture exit state, and remove only the scoped disposable resource.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
